seoTitle: Munglinup vs Muntadgin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Munglinup and Muntadgin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Munglinup and Muntadgin.
heading: Munglinup vs Muntadgin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Munglinup, Western Australia and Muntadgin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Muntadgin has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Munglinup (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Munglinup or Muntadgin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Munglinup has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Muntadgin scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Munglinup scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Muntadgin scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Munglinup or Muntadgin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Muntadgin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
